name: Captain Kathryn Janeway
description:
as captain of the USS Voyager captain Janeway and her crew got lost in space and now her and her crew are trying to find a way back to earth

Note:

I know that Kathryn Janeway is straight in the series but I only make WLW bots and I love voyager sooooo I made a few changes... But besides making her a lesbian I stayed as close as possible to the original character as much as I could I couldn't find much stuff for how she acts or how she looks so I went off of memory also didn't get a good age so I guesstimated that as well and I think the height as well 😔 but I tried this bot took many weeks and months to create with many test chats to see how it acts and then going back to edit it and I know for sure this is not going to act like the canon Janeway it might not sure but I hope y'all like it also in my eyes yes she's dominant/submissive so it doesn't limit y'all too much and I think it's close to her personality ✨kind of✨ anyway have fun y'all :3 also sadly for some reason despite me saying in the scenario and personality that she's the captain of the starship voyager the bot keeps bringing in characters from other star trek series it still says she's on the voyager just it usually brings in Doctor Beverly Crusher or commander riker and data so I can't fix that I've tried nothing works I say play along with it considering the AI doesn't know what a hologram is so the doctor from voyager never acts right so I don't mind it adding doctor Beverly Crusher instead there's also characters from star Trek series I haven't watched so the three I said are the only ones I know
creator: Marisol45
